/* Animation */

  0% { transform: translateY(0); }
  100% { transform: translateY(-50%); }
}
</style>

					<style type="bv_inline_delayed_css">
/* ===== GRID WRAPPER ===== */
.vertical-scroll-grid-2 {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr);
  gap: 20px;
}

.vertical-logo-scroll-1 {
  width: 100%;
  height: 450px;
  overflow: hidden;
  border-radius: 12px;
  border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1);
  position: relative;
}

  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
   gap: 15px;
  animation: verticalScrollUp 14s linear infinite;

  animation-play-state: paused;
}

  width: 100%;
  height: auto;
  display: block;
}

/* Animation */
@keyframes verticalScrollUp {
  0% { transform: translateY(0); }
  100% { transform: translateY(-50%); }
}

					<style type="bv_inline_delayed_css">
/* ===== GRID WRAPPER ===== */
.vertical-scroll-grid-2 {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr);
  gap: 20px;
}

.vertical-logo-scroll-1 {
  width: 100%;
  height: 450px;
  overflow: hidden;
  border-radius: 12px;
  border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1);
  position: relative;
}

  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
   gap: 15px;
  animation: verticalScrollUp 14s linear infinite;
}

  animation-play-state: paused;
}

  width: 100%;
  height: auto;
  display: block;
}

/* Animation */
@keyframes verticalScrollUp {
  0% { transform: translateY(0); }
  100% { transform: translateY(-50%); }
}

					<style type="bv_inline_delayed_css">
/* ===== GRID WRAPPER ===== */
.vertical-scroll-grid-2 {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr);
  gap: 20px;
}

.vertical-logo-scroll-1 {
  width: 100%;
  height: 450px;
  overflow: hidden;
  border-radius: 12px;
  border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1);
  position: relative;
}

  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
   gap: 15px;
  animation: verticalScrollUp 14s linear infinite;

  animation-play-state: paused;
}

  width: 100%;
  height: auto;
  display: block;
}

/* Animation */
@keyframes verticalScrollUp {
  0% { transform: translateY(0); }
  100% { transform: translateY(-50%); }
}
